title: Agent setup verification checks Claude ambient hooks
summary: Kage setup verification now checks Claude Code ambient hook readiness, not only MCP config. verifyAgentActivation reports checks.ambient hooks present plus hook summary with required, installed, missing, script paths, an
body:
Kage setup verification now checks Claude Code ambient hook readiness, not only MCP config. verifyAgentActivation reports checks.ambient_hooks_present plus hook_summary with required, installed, missing, script paths, and marks Claude Code as needs_setup when ~/.claude.json exists but UserPromptSubmit/PostToolUse/PostToolUseFailure/PreCompact/Stop/SessionEnd hooks or scripts are missing. This prevents partial installs from appearing live after the Kage-native ambient capture work.
Verified by: npm test --prefix mcp -- --test-name-pattern 'setup generates all-agent MCP configuration'
